pr.title: Record: 1.0240 BPB — Multi-Order N-gram Backoff + Entropy-Adaptive Alpha (100% autonomous research via goldfish)

output.summary: Eval-time multi-order n-gram cache with entropy-adaptive mixing augments Soft-Round QAT/GPTQ 11-layer transformer outputs for scoring.
techniques: Multi-order (2–5 gram) backoff cache during evaluation
Entropy-derived mixing weight blending LM and n-gram distributions
Soft-Round QAT plus full Hessian GPTQ quantization on 11L, 512d model
